import time


class RateLimiter:
    def __init__(self, max_calls: int, period: float):
        self.max_calls = max_calls
        self.period = period
        self.calls: list[float] = []

    def acquire(self) -> bool:
        now = time.monotonic()
        self.calls = [t for t in self.calls if now - t < self.period]
        if len(self.calls) < self.max_calls:
            self.calls.append(now)
            return True
        return False


_limiters: dict[str, RateLimiter] = {}


def _get_limiter(user_id: str) -> RateLimiter:
    if user_id not in _limiters:
        _limiters[user_id] = RateLimiter(max_calls=100, period=60)
    return _limiters[user_id]


def handle_request(user_id: str) -> dict:
    limiter = _get_limiter(user_id)
    if not limiter.acquire():
        raise RuntimeError("Rate limit exceeded")
    return {"user_id": user_id, "status": "ok"}


def process_batch(user_ids: list[str]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for uid in user_ids:
        limiter = _get_limiter(uid)
        if limiter.acquire():
            results.append({"user_id": uid, "status": "ok"})
    return results
